caption: A screen recording displays a computer desktop with a print settings menu and a live stream window. In the live stream, a man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, sits in front of a microphone and a monitor. A logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" appears at the bottom of the stream, along with a chat window featuring messages from "Nightbot" that read, "Click the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/N-zSdeBK9". To the left of the stream, a print dialog box is open, showing a list of names including "Ron Wester 2", "James Conti 2", and "Ron Wester 4". As the sequence progresses, a cursor moves through the "Formatting" section of the print settings, checking boxes for "Page numbers", "Workbook title", "Sheet name", "Current date", and "Current time".
